// Optional if you need to find all product movement ending a specific date
// Optional, if you need product movements made by a user

request.description:
## Show All Product Movements

Retrieves a paginated list of all inventory movement records for a specific product. Each movement entry captures changes in stock quantity, the reason for the change, and who performed the action. This endpoint is useful for auditing stock history and tracking inventory adjustments over time.

---

### HTTP Method & URL

```
GET {{BASEURL}}/api/v1/admin/products/product-movement/:productId/show-all

 ```

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a **Bearer Token**. The token is sourced from the `{{TOKEN}}` environment variable and must be included in the `Authorization` header.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{TOKEN}}

 ```

---

### Path Variables

| Variable | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `productId` | UUID (string) | The unique identifier of the product whose movement history is being retrieved. Example: `a12f2296-10e0-460b-a91b-13490de49fac` |

---

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | integer | No | The page number for pagination. Defaults to `1`. |
| `limit` | integer | No | The number of records to return per page. Defaults to `10`. |
| `sortBy` | string | No | The field to sort results by. Example: `createdAt`. |
| `order` | string | No | Sort direction. Accepted values: `ASC` or `DESC`. |
| `startDate` | string (date) | No | Filters movements from this date onward. Format: `YYYY-MM-DD`. Example: `2026-07-05`. This can be empty and it will default to the start of the current date |
| `search` | string | No | Filters movements by a search keyword. Can be empty. |
| `startDate` | string (date) | No | Filters movements starting this date. Format: `YYYY-MM-DD`. Example: `2026-07-13`. Can be empty and will default to the current date. |
| `endDate` | string (date) | No | Filters movements up to this date. Format: `YYYY-MM-DD`. Example: `2026-07-13`. Can be empty and will default to the current date. |
| `employeeId` | UUID (string) | No | Filters movements performed by a specific employee. Example: `bf2c12a0-4d4b-4d0d-a293-1fae1acca27c`. Can Be empty |

---

### Response Structure

A successful request returns a `200 OK` response with the following JSON structure:

``` json
{
  "status": true,
  "product": {
    "id": "string (UUID)",
    "name": "string",
    "sku": "string",
    "description": "string",
    "quantity": "integer — current stock quantity",
    "low_stock_threshold": "integer",
    "price": "string (decimal)",
    "productCreator": {
      "id": "string (UUID)",
      "first_name": "string",
      "last_name": "string"
    },
    "category": {
      "id": "string (UUID)",
      "name": "string"
    }
  },
  "productMovements": [
    {
      "id": "string (UUID)",
      "change_quantity": "integer — quantity added or removed",
      "quantity_after_change": "integer — stock level after the movement",
      "reason": "string — e.g. refund, sale, adjustment",
      "description": "string — additional notes on the movement",
      "createdAt": "string (ISO 8601 datetime)",
      "performedBy": {
        "id": "string (UUID)",
        "first_name": "string",
        "last_name": "string"
      },
      "changedProduct": {
        "id": "string (UUID)",
        "name": "string"
      }
    }
  ]
}

 ```

---

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Gas Can",                                               
    "sku": "SCEP-SMART-1GAL-RED",
    "categoryId": "1917f9a0-81fd-4fd1-94fc-4dd1472d8157",
    "description": "1 Gallon gas can, color red",
    "quantity": 60,
    "lowStockThreshold": 10,
    "price": 100,  
    "editReason": "Correction for the stock added, wrongly input of the stock"
}
